gt_sql: SELECT T1.`First Date` FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.LDH < 500 ORDER BY T2.LDH ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT p."First Date"
FROM Laboratory l
JOIN Patient p ON l.ID = p.ID
WHERE l.LDH < 500
ORDER BY l.LDH DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: For the patient with the highest lactate dehydrogenase in the normal range, when was his or her data first recorded?
